'''Ahita Othar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|woman]] affiliated with the [[Exchange]]. She owned the ''[[Ebon Hawk]]'' at one point, and later met a tragic [[Death/Legends|death]], an occurrence that helped contribute to the underworld rumor that the ''Hawk'' was an unlucky ship.<ref name="KOTOR" />
